commit_message: Refactor scraper to use direct requests and bump to 0.8.18
extraction_method: gh api (REST GitHub) — git clone blocked in sandbox
key_findings: FSBO detection is API-provided (advertiser.type==seller/community), NOT heuristic-inferred — confirms Wave 2 decision for BR heuristic approach.
7 HomeFlags booleanas (is_pending, is_contingent, is_new_construction, is_coming_soon, is_new_listing, is_price_reduced, is_foreclosure) — pattern transferível para Epic 7.
Composition pattern Agent + Broker + Office + Builder mapeia direto para BR (corretor + imobiliária + escritório + construtora).
Pagination cap of 10,000 results (hard) — equivalent in BR portals; chunking by date+location is required.
Date precision enhancement using last_status_change_date — pattern aplicável a portais BR que misturam dia/hora.
Threadpool of 20 workers, no async — não-otimizado para I/O-heavy crawls. Crawlee TS é superior.
transferability_to_epic7: HIGH for schema design, LOW for code reuse
epic7_actions_recommended: Transpile Property/Advertisers/HomeFlags Pydantic → Zod schemas in packages/shared/schemas/
Implement classifyAdvertiser() function inferring FSBO/agent/broker/builder via Wave 2 heuristics
Adopt 7 boolean discriminant flags (mapeamento BR em 02-domain-model.md)
Set explicit HTTP timeout (30s) — HomeHarvest omits, risky.
Use Crawlee AutoscaledPool em vez de ThreadPoolExecutor
